word: H1272 - בָּרַח - bârach - baw-rakh' - Chase ; drive away

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּרח

Transliteration: bârach

Phonetic: baw-rakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to go through, flee, run away, chase, drive away, put to flight, reach, shoot (extend), hurry away
    1. (Qal)
      1. to go, pass through
      2. to flee
      3. to hasten, come quickly
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to pass through
      2. to cause to flee, put to flight
      3. to drive away

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 284

Part(s) of speech: Verb
